blocks.content: Eli texted both of them constantly, which was the only thing that hadn't changed.
weekly check in. kit: still alive? daisy: still warm enough? me: thriving. report back.
alive. film class is going to kill me but alive
warm enough. barely. send a second coat
i told you both to pack for your climates
you told kit to 'dress like you made an effort' for prom. that's not climate advice
genuinely good. state school is underrated. also i met someone
her name is Priya. she's in my sociology class. she is extremely out of my league and has not noticed this yet so i am moving fast
this is the best news i've had all month
priya from sociology. got it. rooting for you man
i know. now someone tell me when you two are going to figure your situation out because watching from here is extremely stressful
